messages.subject: [OGRUG] Blog that may be of interest to R users
messages.subject_clean: [OGRUG] Blog that may be of interest to R users
messages.body_plain:
Check out

http://blog.revolution-computing.com

It's from REvolution Computing, who make a commercial version of R. But the blog may be of general interest.

Nick

_____________________________________________________________ 

Nick Barrowman, PhD 
Senior Statistician, Clinical Research Unit 
Children's Hospital of Eastern Ontario Research Institute 
401 Smyth Road, Ottawa, Ontario, K1H 8L1, Canada 
Tel 613-737-7600 x 3971 - Fax 613-738-4250 
nbarrowman at cheo.on.ca - http://www.cheori.org/cru
